title: Thailand Application to Register a Limited Company (Form บอจ.1)
description: The Department of Business Development's (DBD) "แบบ บอจ.1" (Form บอจ.1), the cover application a promoter/applicant files with the provincial or Bangkok Registrar of Partnerships and Companies to request one of several company-registration actions under the Civil and Commercial Code. Opens Thailand's Business Formation vertical (2 of 6). The live 2-page, 101-AcroForm-widget source is a registrar-facing routing form: page 1's 17-value checkbox group lets the applicant declare exactly one requested action (new company formation, registering a standalone Memorandum of Association, a partnership-to-company conversion, a capital increase/decrease or merger special resolution, five distinct Memorandum-of-Association amendment sub-types, an Articles-of-Association amendment, a merger, a director change, and others), a further 3-checkbox group for optional post-registration requests (labor-bylaw copy submission, trademark registration, import/export identity card), company/existing-registration identification, a two-signatory signature block, and a statutory false-statement warning notice; page 2 is a bundled "หนังสือรับรอง" (certificate of incorporation) template that the Registrar — not the applicant — completes and issues after approval. This v1.0.0 deliberately scopes to the new-company-incorporation ("จัดตั้งบริษัทจำกัด") action pathway: the full registrationActionType enum (all 17 source values, so the field is self-contained per the source's own single checkbox group), the 3 optional post-registration-request checkboxes, company-name/existing-registration-reference identification, the statutory warning notice, and the applicant's two-signatory signature block. Out of scope for this v1.0.0, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md: the 14 free-text sub-fields that are dependent on the 16 non-formation registrationActionType values (Memorandum/Articles amendment item references, partnership-conversion and merger company details, director in/out counts, head-/branch-office relocation text), the Registrar/witness certification block at the bottom of page 1, and the entirety of page 2 (the Registrar-issued certificate template, not an applicant input). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Thailand or the Department of Business Development.

source.documentRef: แบบ บอจ.1 (Form บอจ.1), application to register a limited company / notification of company-registration actions

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2601 (child of GOV-2599's parallel Thailand delegation, itself following GOV-2591/GOV-2593's scouting). Opens Thailand's Business Formation vertical (2 of 6); Taxes opened Thailand as the registry's 44th jurisdiction via GOV-2593. Independently re-fetched https://www.dbd.go.th/download/downloads/03_boj/form_boj1.pdf this cycle: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 801091 bytes, sha256 433aace18e925d75236afe99e08796763744040e5f10f5781445e77d70796f72 — matching the task's cited figures exactly. Re-ran pdfjs-dist (legacy build, getAnnotations({intent:'display'}) filtered to subtype==='Widget'), correlating each widget's rect against getTextContent() text on both sides (not just left): confirmed 2 pages, 101 AcroForm widgets total, 45 (page 1) / 56 (page 2), matching exactly. Deliberately scoped to the new-company-incorporation pathway; see this document's own description and VERIFICATION.md for the full in/out-of-scope breakdown and disclosed judgment calls, including the discovery that page 2 is a Registrar-issued certificate template bundled into the same PDF rather than part of the applicant's own submission.

fields.name: applicationReceivedReference
fields.label: Application receipt reference (registrar-completed)
fields.description: The registration office's own receipt annotation, combining a received-date blank and a request-number blank on one printed line. Completed by the receiving DBD registration office at intake, not by the applicant. Modeled as a single optional string since the two blanks share one AcroForm widget in the source and could not be confidently split into two distinct fields — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Company name
fields.description: The proposed or existing company's name in Thai, excluding the mandatory "จำกัด" (Limited) suffix, which is pre-printed on the form immediately after this blank.

fields.name: existingCompanyBookNumber
fields.label: Existing company's book (บค) registration reference
fields.description: The existing company's "บค" (book) registration reference. Applicable only when this filing concerns an already-registered company (an amendment, capital change, merger, or similar action per registrationActionType) rather than a new incorporation; left blank for this schema's supported new-incorporation pathway.

fields.name: existingCompanyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Existing company's registration number
fields.description: The existing company's registration number. Applicable only to a non-new-incorporation action, per the same condition as existingCompanyBookNumber.

fields.name: registrationActionType
fields.label: Requested registration action
fields.description: Which single type of DBD company-registration action this filing requests, under the Civil and Commercial Code. The source presents these as one self-contained group of 17 checkboxes, so all 17 values are enumerated here; however, this v1.0.0 fully supports only the "newIncorporation" pathway (see this schema's own description and VERIFICATION.md) — the other 16 values' own dependent sub-fields (Memorandum/Articles amendment item references, partnership-conversion and merger company details, director in/out counts, office-relocation text) are out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "(1) ข้าพเจ้าขอจดทะเบียนบริษัทจำกัด ตามประมวลกฎหมายแพ่งและพาณิชย์ดังต่อไปนี้" and its 17 checkboxes

fields.name: laborBylawCopyRequested
fields.label: Also requesting: submit a copy of the company's labor work rules
fields.description: Whether the applicant, once the requested registration is complete, additionally requests to submit a copy of the company's labor work rules under the Labor Protection Act B.E. 2541 — applicable only to an employer with 10 or more employees, per the source's own parenthetical.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, section (2): "ขอส่งสำเนาข้อบังคับเกี่ยวกับการทำงาน ตามพระราชบัญญัติคุ้มครองแรงงาน พ.ศ. 2541 (กรณีมีลูกจ้างตั้งแต่ 10 คน ขึ้นไป)"

fields.name: trademarkRegistrationRequested
fields.label: Also requesting: trademark registration
fields.description: Whether the applicant additionally requests trademark registration under the Trademark Act B.E. 2534.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, section (2): "ขอจดทะเบียนเครื่องหมายการค้าตามพระราชบัญญัติเครื่องหมายการค้า พ.ศ. 2534"

fields.name: importExportCardRequested
fields.label: Also requesting: importer-exporter identification card
fields.description: Whether the applicant additionally requests an importer-exporter identification card, per the Department of Foreign Trade's notice on electronic import-export documentation, B.E. 2554.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, section (2): "ขอมีบัตรประจำตัวผู้ส่งออก – นำเข้าสินค้าตามประกาศกรมการค้าต่างประเทศ เรื่องหลักเกณฑ์วิธีการและเงื่อนไขการขอรับหนังสือสำคัญ การส่งออก – นำเข้า สินค้าโดยวิธีการทางอิเล็กทรอนิกส์ พ.ศ. 2554"

fields.name: applicantSignatoryName
fields.label: First signatory's printed name
fields.description: Printed name of the first signatory (a company promoter, or a director with binding signing authority) beneath their handwritten signature.

fields.name: applicantSignatoryName2
fields.label: Second signatory's printed name (with company seal)
fields.description: Printed name of a second signatory, affixed alongside the company seal, when the company's authorized-signing rule requires more than one signature to bind the application. Optional: a sole-signatory filing (e.g. before the company seal exists) leaves this blank.

documents.label: Statutory false-statement / late-filing warning notice
documents.statement: คำเตือน 1. ผู้ใดแจ้งข้อความอันเป็นเท็จแก่เจ้าพนักงานมีความผิด ตามประมวลกฎหมายอาญา มาตรา 137, 267 และ 268 2. นายทะเบียนอาจเพิกถอนการจดทะเบียน ถ้าปรากฏว่าข้อความอันเป็นสาระสำคัญที่จดทะเบียนไม่ถูกต้องหรือเป็นเท็จ 3. การไม่ยื่นคำขอจดทะเบียนภายในเวลาที่กฎหมายกำหนดจะมีความผิด ตามพระราชบัญญัติกำหนดความผิดเกี่ยวกับห้างหุ้นส่วนจดทะเบียน ห้างหุ้นส่วนจำกัด บริษัทจำกัด สมาคม และมูลนิธิ พ.ศ.2499 ("Warning: 1. Anyone giving a false statement to an official commits an offense under Criminal Code sections 137, 267 and 268. 2. The Registrar may revoke a registration if a materially registered particular is found incorrect or false. 3. Failing to file a registration application within the legally prescribed time is an offense under the Act Prescribing Offenses Relating to Registered Partnerships, Limited Partnerships, Limited Companies, Associations and Foundations B.E. 2499.")
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 footer: "คำเตือน" (three numbered warnings)
